positive: A stylized, symmetrical graphic illustration featuring a celestial owl perched on a crescent moon. The owl should have bold, geometric feather patterns and wide, glowing eyes. Incorporate trailing constellations, abstract nebula swirls, and minimalist geometric flora (stars, comets, stylized leaves) surrounding the main subject. The style must be highly polished, reminiscent of modern Norse mythology meets Art Deco poster design. Use a limited color palette of deep midnight blues, vibrant teal, gold metallic accents, and clean cream white. Composition must be centered, suitable for a repeating textile pattern or single apparel graphic. Vector-graphic quality, crisp edges, strong silhouette, dramatic backlighting, high contrast, isolated on a clean background.
negative: blur, grainy, low resolution, watermark, text, logo, signature, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, cartoon, photographic, bokeh
